name: Workflow Orchestrator
description: YAML/JSON-driven workflow orchestration for OpenClaw agents with dependency graphs, parallel execution, retries, output gates, dry runs, cancellation, resume, and persisted run state.

workflowsDir.description: Directory containing workflow definition files. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workflows.

runsDir.description: Directory where workflow run state files are stored. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workflow-runs.

baseDir.description: Base directory for resolving relative output file paths. Defaults to the gateway working directory.

concurrency.description: Maximum number of workflow steps that can run in parallel. Defaults to 3.

notifyChannel.description: Channel ID or name for workflow progress notifications. If omitted, notifications are logged only.

sessionModel.description: Default model for spawned step sessions when a step does not specify its own model.

pollIntervalMs.description: How often to poll step session status in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000.

cronDeliveryMode.description: Delivery mode for internal workflow step cron jobs. Defaults to none.

cronDeliveryChannel.description: Explicit delivery channel for cron jobs when cronDeliveryMode is announce, e.g. discord or whatsapp.

cronDeliveryTo.description: Optional explicit delivery target for cron jobs.

sessionAdapter.description: Session adapter to use. For headless browser/application workflows, use runtime-subagent.

cancelGraceMs.description: Grace period to wait after requesting worker cancellation.

autoResumeOnStartup.description: When true, Gateway startup scans persisted workflow runs and automatically resumes runs that were still marked running.

stateBackend.description: Requested workflow state backend. Default: filesystem.

redisUrl.description: Native Redis connection URL for workflow state/artifacts.

redisPrefix.description: Redis key prefix used by workflow state/artifact backends.

redisPrefer.description: Preferred Redis transport when using stateBackend=redis or auto.

redisMcpServer.description: Explicit MCP server name for Redis access (for example MCP_DOCKER).

redisMcpConfigPath.description: Optional MCPorter config path used when resolving MCP Redis servers.

redisMcpRootDir.description: Optional root directory used by MCPorter when resolving relative MCP paths.

redisMcpCallTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for MCP Redis tool calls via MCPorter.

redisMcpServerDefinition.description: Optional inline MCP server definition translated to an MCPorter server.

redisMcpToolPrefix.description: Deprecated alias for redisMcpServer. Treated as an MCP server name, not a __ tool prefix.

filesystemFallback.description: When true, fallback to filesystem when Redis is unavailable.

materializeOutputs.description: Controls when artifact outputs are materialized to filesystem paths.

autoResumeOnStartup.label: Auto-resume on Gateway startup
autoResumeOnStartup.help: Resume interrupted workflow runs after Gateway restart.

runsDir.label: Run state directory
runsDir.help: Folder where workflow run JSON state files are written.

baseDir.label: Base directory
baseDir.help: Relative output paths in workflow steps are resolved under this directory.

notifyChannel.label: Notification channel
notifyChannel.help: Optional channel for workflow progress messages.

sessionModel.label: Default step model
sessionModel.help: Used by steps that do not declare their own model.

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll interval
pollIntervalMs.help: Milliseconds between status checks for running step sessions.

stateBackend.label: State backend
stateBackend.help: Choose filesystem, redis, auto, or dual backend resolution.

redisUrl.label: Redis URL
redisUrl.help: Native Redis URL used when state backend resolves to redis-native.

redisPrefer.label: Redis transport preference
redisPrefer.help: Prefer native Redis, MCP Redis, or allow automatic resolution.

redisMcpServer.label: Redis MCP server
redisMcpServer.help: Explicit MCP server name used for Redis via MCPorter.

redisMcpConfigPath.label: MCPorter config path
redisMcpConfigPath.help: Optional path to mcporter.json for Redis MCP resolution.

filesystemFallback.label: Filesystem fallback
filesystemFallback.help: Fallback to filesystem when Redis is unavailable.
